items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: Placeholder answer — replace with your actual service area or coverage zone.

items.question: How do I book an appointment?
items.answer: Placeholder answer — describe your booking process (call, form, online, etc.).

items.question: What are your hours?
items.answer: Placeholder answer — list your operating hours and any weekend/emergency availability.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: Placeholder answer — describe your pricing approach (fixed, quote-based, packages, etc.).

items.question: Do you offer a guarantee?
items.answer: Placeholder answer — describe any warranty, satisfaction guarantee, or return policy.

items.question: How long does it take?
items.answer: Placeholder answer — give typical timeframes for your most common services.
